title: Asphalt Blocks
description: Adds Asphalt Blocks in block, slab and carpet form, which grant a speed boost when walked on, similar to Terraria
body:
# Asphalt Blocks
This mod adds in 3 blocks, Asphalt Blocks, Slabs, and Carpets. 

When you stand on them, your speed doubles. This mod is inspired by Terraria's Asphalt Blocks.
